blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
